parameters.query:
SELECT
  m.id                    AS milestone_id,
  m.title                 AS milestone_title,
  m.end_date              AS milestone_end_date,
  m.start_date            AS milestone_start_date,

  DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(m.end_date)) AS overdue_days,

  pm.id                   AS project_id,
  pm.title                AS project_title,

  mo.email                AS milestone_owner_email,
  mo.firstname            AS milestone_owner_firstname,
  mo.lastname             AS milestone_owner_lastname,

  pmo.email               AS project_manager_email,
  pmo.firstname           AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname            AS project_manager_lastname,

  tm.id                   AS team_user_id,
  tm.firstname            AS team_user_first_name,
  tm.lastname             AS team_user_last_name,
  tm.email                AS team_user_email

FROM milestones m

JOIN users mo
  ON mo.id = m.owner_id

JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = m.project_management_id

JOIN users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

JOIN project_team_members ptm
  ON ptm.project_team_id = pm.project_team_id

JOIN users tm
  ON tm.id = ptm.user_id

WHERE
  DATE(m.end_date) < CURDATE()
  AND (m.status IS NULL OR m.status != 'Completed')
  AND pmo.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84);

parameters.subject: =Milestone Overdue: {{$json.milestone_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.project_manager_firstname}} {{$json.project_manager_lastname}},

This is to formally notify you that the milestone {{$json.milestone_title}} has exceeded its planned completion date and is currently overdue.

Milestone Status

Milestone Name {{$json.milestone_title}}
Project Name {{$json.project_title}}
Start Date {{$json.milestone_start_date || 'N/A'}}
Planned End Date {{$json.milestone_end_date}}
Overdue By {{$json.overdue_days}} days
Milestone Link View Milestone Details

Impact & Action Required

The delay may impact dependent tasks and overall project timelines. We request an immediate status update along with a recovery or mitigation plan.

Regards,
PMO – Escalation Desk

parameters.query:
SELECT
  m.id                    AS milestone_id,
  m.title                 AS milestone_title,
  m.end_date              AS milestone_end_date,
  m.start_date            AS milestone_start_date,

  -- overdue calculation
  DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(m.end_date)) AS overdue_days,

  pm.id                   AS project_id,
  pm.title                AS project_title,

  -- milestone owner
  mo.email                AS milestone_owner_email,
  mo.firstname            AS milestone_owner_firstname,
  mo.lastname             AS milestone_owner_lastname,

  -- project manager
  pmo.email               AS project_manager_email,
  pmo.firstname           AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname            AS project_manager_lastname,

  -- team member
  tm.id                   AS team_user_id,
  tm.firstname            AS team_user_first_name,
  tm.lastname             AS team_user_last_name,
  tm.email                AS team_user_email

FROM milestones m

-- milestone owner
JOIN users mo
  ON mo.id = m.owner_id

-- project
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = m.project_management_id

-- project manager
JOIN users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

-- project team
JOIN project_team_members ptm
  ON ptm.project_team_id = pm.project_team_id

-- team members
JOIN users tm
  ON tm.id = ptm.user_id

WHERE
  DATE(m.end_date) < CURDATE()
  AND (m.status IS NULL OR m.status != 'Completed');
